violations.description: General employee practices. — --Food employee observed drinking/using open beverage container outside of designated area. Store personal beverage in closed containers. Store away from work surfaces to protect from potential contamination of foods and work surfaces.--Food employee observed without proper hair restraint. Recommend hair restraint for kitchen employees.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Sides salads prepared on plates in walk in cooler not covered/protected.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Sanitizer spray bottle not testing at time of inspection. Employee adding soap and water to dispensed sanitizer.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. Multiple food items have exceeded the 10 day shelf life. Discard as needed.

Variance requirement for specialized processing methods. — --Food establishment did not obtain approved variance or HACCP plan from regulatory authority for special process of vacuum sealing and sous vide cooking.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. Invert spoons on cook line and forks in service area near reach in condiments cooler. Store items so handles are up.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Box of portion cups on floor in service alley. Store off floor.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Popcorn style ceiling in BOH prep area.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. 2 chemical spray bottles not properly labeled in kitchen.

Variance requirement for specialized processing methods. — --Food establishment did not obtain approved variance or HACCP plan from regulatory authority for special process of vacuum sealer and sous vide.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors need cleaning under shelving units in walk in cooler and under equipment in prep areas.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Areas of repair needed to walls/ceiling.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. Re-used bleach based cleaner chemical bottle for QA sanitizer solution.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
